title: scrophucephalus minimus
intro: Scrophucephalus minimus, also known as Lesser Club Moss, is a small, club-shaped plant that belongs to the genus Lycopodiopsida. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Scrophucephalus minimus include reducing inflammation and congestion in the lungs, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into tea, powder, or capsules to be consumed for its medicinal properties.
